reviews.comment:
SEÑORES ACA: EN LA PAGINA DICE SABADOS ABIERTO LAS 24HS, EL CONTESTADOR TELEFONICO DA TODAS LAS OPCIONES DE SERVICIOS PERO  NO ATIENDEN Y EN 5' LO DEJAN CON EL TELEFONO EN LA MANO Y LA COMUNICACION CORTADA.
PORQUE PONEN 24HS???
DE LIBERTADOR ME MANDARON PARA ORO A LAS 15HS. DICIENDOME QUE ESTABA ABIERTO HASTA LAS 18 , LLEGUE Y LA GUARDIA ME DIJO QUE CERRABAN A LAS 13.
A VER SEÑORES: LAS 24HS? LAS 18? LAS 13? NUNCA TAL VEZ??????
CADA VEZ MAS EN BAJA EL ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Gentlemen: The website says they're open 24 hours a day on Saturdays, but the answering machine lists all the service options, yet no one answers. After 5 minutes, they leave you hanging with the phone in your hand and the call disconnected.
Why do they advertise 24 hours???
They sent me from Libertador to Oro at 3 PM, telling me it was open until 6 PM. When I arrived, the security guard told me they closed at 1 PM. Listen, gentlemen: 24 hours? 6 PM? 1 PM? Maybe never??????
ACA is getting worse and worse.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBeHFmNmZBEAE
